design_summary: Caveman compression vs verbose prose brief, severity-keyword lens, haiku-4.5, 8 fixture issues
quality_note: Both disagreements are upward escalations — C errs high, not low. Add a single grounding anchor ('blocker=RCE/data-loss/full-outage only') to neutralise over-escalation. Recommendation: ADOPT B14b CAVEMAN BRIEF as sub-pattern of B14 PROMPT THRIFT for TRIVIAL-class lenses.
